ideas.title: CLIP-A-self text prototype adapter

v1.rationale: v1 already uses GPT/VDT sentence averages and an MLP text adapter for seen prototypes. CLIP-A-self can test whether sentence-level self-attention selects more useful VDT cues while preserving the existing GZSL label mapping, class order, logits shape, and seen-only CE training path.

v2.rationale: IDEA-0001 was promoted into the active GTPJ-v2 mainline by owner decision on 2026-06-27 using TRIAL-001 ATTEMPT-019. It is no longer a pending v2 candidate; future v2 work should focus on confirmation, U/S gap analysis, and ablations around the accepted adapter.

v3.rationale: IDEA-0001 is inherited by GTPJ-v3 from the accepted v2 code path; it remains part of the mainline stack but is not the new v3 delta.

v4.rationale: Inherited by GTPJ-v4 from the v3 code path; local-v3-054 changes only tuned config weights, not the PSE interface.

v5.rationale: Inherited by GTPJ-v5; v5 activates conditional BVSA text and tuned PSE/local weights but keeps the PSE interface and legacy aliases intact.

ideas.target_component: seen-class text prototype adapter in model/MyModel.py
ideas.hypothesis: Replacing the v1 MLP seen-text adapter with a sentence-level CLIP-A-self adapter can learn a better aggregation of GPT/VDT descriptions for seen classes, improving GZSL H or ZS without changing class order, seen/unseen split, label mapping, logits shape, or evaluation semantics.

expected_effect.U: should not drop materially because unseen prototypes stay raw sentence means in TRIAL-001
expected_effect.S: may improve if seen prototypes use more discriminative VDT cues
expected_effect.H: target metric; promote only with complete evidence and no interface pollution

ideas.implementation_scope: TRIAL-001 only changes the text prototype construction path: preserve sentence-level GPT/VDT embeddings, apply CLIP-A-self to seen class sentence sets, keep an outer prototype residual against the raw sentence mean, and leave unseen prototypes as raw sentence means by default.
ideas.risk: A seen-only CE signal can overfit the adapter toward seen categories and pull text prototypes away from the original CLIP/VDT space. L2SP is not part of TRIAL-001; it is recorded only as a follow-up ablation/anchoring question if prototype drift appears.
ideas.compatibility: The switch-off path must keep the existing v1 MLP adapter behavior and the same forward/loss/eval interfaces. New parameters are trial-local and should load older checkpoints with strict=False only when intentionally used.
ideas.transfer_notes: For future versions, re-check whether the text prototype owner is still model/MyModel.py and whether v2 keeps the same GPT/VDT sentence source and seen/unseen split semantics before reusing this idea.

evidence.ref: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/CV璁烘枃/2023/Enhancing CLIP with GPT-4锛欻arnessing Visual Descriptions as Prompts.pdf
evidence.note: PDF abstract states the code, prompts, and auxiliary text dataset are available at github.com/mayug/VDT-Adapter.
Official code contains SelfAttnAdapter and a self_attn branch over per-class GPT/VDT sentence embeddings.
TRIAL-001 current formal best is ATTEMPT-019 H=74.29, promoted to GTPJ-v2 by owner decision on 2026-06-27; clean confirmation and U/S gap analysis remain follow-ups.

ideas.next_action: Use GTPJ-v5 as the active mainline; future tuning can inspect PSE/BVSA weight sensitivity while comparing repeat mean against v4 confirmed_H=74.45.

ideas.title: FAE-memory JEPA auxiliary loss
ideas.source_ref: owner:2026-06-27:move AG-JEPA visual context after FAE while keeping FAE-pre patch target

v2.rationale: TRIAL-002 strict main-path FAE-memory JEPA plus conditional text is accepted by owner as GTPJ-v3 despite mixed confirmation evidence; retain stochastic-variance warning.

v3.rationale: Accepted as the GTPJ-v3 delta by owner decision on 2026-06-28. Best observed ATTEMPT-004 H=74.27; clean seed-42 reruns H=74.14 and H=74.01 show stochastic variance, so confirmed_H remains pending.

v4.rationale: Inherited by GTPJ-v4 from GTPJ-v3; v4 promotes a min3-confirmed tuned configuration and does not introduce a new IDEA-0002 code path.

v5.rationale: TRIAL-003 extends IDEA-0002 by routing all_text_cond into BVSA cross/local_score. Owner activated the best main100 candidate as GTPJ-v5; v4 remains the stronger confirmed reference by repeat mean.

ideas.target_component: AG-JEPA auxiliary loss path in model/MyModel.py
ideas.hypothesis: Using FAE-enhanced visual memory as JEPA context while keeping the prediction target as detached pre-FAE patch_z should make AG-JEPA regularize the main visual memory path without changing class order, seen/unseen split, logits shape, or evaluation semantics.

expected_effect.U: may improve if FAE memory learns class-conditioned visual evidence that transfers to unseen classes
expected_effect.S: should remain comparable if seen-class text and CE label mapping are unchanged
expected_effect.H: target metric; any improvement remains trial evidence until clean confirmation

ideas.implementation_scope: Add trial-local JEPA context/text modes. ATTEMPT-001 keeps fae_memory as a keep-only FAE recomputation path. ATTEMPT-002 adds fae_main_memory, which mean-pools kept positions from the main forward path jepa_memory, and jepa_text_mode=conditional, which feeds sample-conditioned text into positive and negative AG-JEPA predictor branches.
ideas.risk: Strict main-path jepa_memory can leak masked-token information through FAE self-attention; conditional text lengthens the gradient path through meta_net; lastvit-selected patch alignment must remain explicit; negative loss should keep visual context detached.
ideas.compatibility: Switch-off or jepa_context_mode=embed plus jepa_text_mode=adapted must preserve the current AG-JEPA path. The forward output can include extra auxiliary keys, but logits, class order, label mapping, seen/unseen split, and metric calculation must remain unchanged.
ideas.transfer_notes: Future versions must re-check whether CrossModalTransformer still exposes embed_cv, FAE memory, and the same selected-patch semantics before reusing this idea.

evidence.note: Owner identified that the current AG-JEPA loss does not directly optimize FAE or CrossModal decoder parameters.
ATTEMPT-001 _ag_jepa_loss recomputes keep-only FAE context inside the loss branch. ATTEMPT-002 passes main-path jepa_memory and sample-conditioned text into AG-JEPA.
Long-form motivation, hypothesis, intended boundary, risks, and minimum evidence.
ATTEMPT-001 H=73.82, delta_H=-0.47 vs v2 best_observed_H=74.29 (unconfirmed); trial decision=revise.
ATTEMPT-010 H=74.01, delta_H=-0.28 vs v2 best_observed_H=74.29 (unconfirmed); trial decision=not_confirmed.
Owner accepted TRIAL-002 as GTPJ-v3 with stochastic variance explicitly preserved; confirmed_H remains pending.
TRIAL-003 routes all_text_cond into BVSA; main100 best_observed_H=74.54, repeat mean H=74.44, owner activated as GTPJ-v5.
GTPJ-v5 is the active mainline for future tuning; v4 confirmed_H=74.45 remains the confirmed reference.

ideas.next_action: Use GTPJ-v5 as the active mainline. Next work should tune from config/versions/v5.yaml and compare repeat mean against v4 confirmed_H=74.45.

ideas.title: Dynamic Residual Routing
ideas.source_ref: owner:2026-06-30:make residual and mixture coefficients dynamic routes

v5.rationale: GTPJ-v5 already has fixed residual and mixture coefficients on the same active path: local_weight, icsa_ratio, weight_s2v, and pse_outer_ratio. TRIAL-001 ATTEMPT-001 completed 50/50 jobs; best dynamic single H=74.39 and dynamic repeat mean H=74.23 did not beat v4 confirmed H=74.45 or v5 repeat mean H=74.44. Follow-up should keep ICSA fixed and focus direction/local/PSE gates.
blockers: ATTEMPT-001 did not exceed v4 confirmed_H=74.45 or v5 repeat mean H=74.44

ideas.target_component: model/MyModel.py dynamic residual and score routing
ideas.hypothesis: Replacing v5 fixed coefficients with gates initialized near the fixed values can adapt local score strength, ICSA injection strength, BVSA direction mix, and PSE outer residual per sample or class. If the gates avoid collapse, they may preserve seen-class strength while improving unseen transfer and H stability.

expected_effect.U: Main target. Dynamic local/ICSA/PSE balance may improve unseen transfer by avoiding a single fixed seen-biased coefficient.
expected_effect.S: Should stay near v5 if gates initialize around v5 fixed values and anchor regularization is enabled.
expected_effect.H: Target improvement is repeat mean above v5 repeat mean H=74.44 and preferably above v4 confirmed_H=74.45.

ideas.implementation_scope: TRIAL-001 only adds dynamic routing gates, config switches, gate statistics, tests, and two-GPU batch automation. The switch-off path must preserve v5 behavior. The trial does not change dataset split, class index order, evaluation metrics, optimizer, or promotion status.
ideas.risk: Gate collapse to 0/1, hidden seen-class overfit, sample/class broadcasting mistakes, silent switch-off drift, extra compute, and config alias drift are the main risks.
ideas.compatibility: use_dynamic_routing=false keeps the v5 fixed path. Fixed gate modes initialize to v5 values and provide an auditable bridge between static coefficients and learned gates.
ideas.transfer_notes: Treat as a routing mechanism tied to BVSA/PSE/ICSA. Reuse in later versions only after verifying class order, conditional text path, and score scale invariants.

evidence.note: Owner proposed replacing residual-like coefficients a*x+(1-a)*x with dynamic routing gates.
Existing fixed coefficients appear in PSE outer residual, ICSA text injection, BVSA direction mix, and final local_score blend.
v5 is the active mainline; v4 confirmed_H=74.45 remains the confirmed reference.
ATTEMPT-003 H=74.86, delta_H=+0.32 vs v5 best_observed_H=74.54 (unconfirmed); trial decision=keep.

ideas.next_action: TRIAL-001 ATTEMPT-003 synchronized as keep: H=74.86, delta_H=+0.32 vs v5 best_observed_H=74.54 (unconfirmed); do not promote/tag before v5 clean confirmation.
